creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Birgmeier from comment #12)

We still still don't know why the flags are set on /bin/basename... Until I understand where they are coming from, or what environment we see them, I'm loathe to change anything...

The cmp || cp might work. I'll have to take a look...  We have a big problem with bmake using the link time rather than the target of the link time for rebuilding, so there's always a lot of noise in a world build to plow through...
